import React from 'react'; import { FaInstagram, FaDiscord, FaFacebook, FaEnvelope } from 'react-icons/fa'; import type { IconBaseProps } from 'react-icons'; import { FeedbackForm } from '../features/feedback/FeedbackForm'; const Footer: React.FC = () => { const InstagramIcon = FaInstagram as unknown as React.ComponentType; const DiscordIcon = FaDiscord as unknown as React.ComponentType; const FacebookIcon = FaFacebook as unknown as React.ComponentType; const EnvelopeIcon = FaEnvelope as unknown as React.ComponentType; return (

Connect With Us!

Send Feedback

We value your thoughts! Let us know how we can improve or if you encountered any issues.

© {new Date().getFullYear()} VSA. All rights reserved.

); }; export default Footer;
